title: 日本ダービーの後に・さらに高みへ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki manages to complete the Japanese
Derby in full. She's exhausted by the long race,
but everyone is inspired by her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gallant form stirs even the heart of the
younger student, who finds herself wanting to
keep watching Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the long-distance Kikuka Sho. I worry
whether Fuji Kiseki can handle it, but she's full of
nothing but confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Next on our schedule is the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our race through the summer toward the Kikuka
Sho and the strong opponents waiting there
begins now!
